name: io.github.aidocx/mcp-server
description: Create, upload, and manage business documents and AI-generated presentation decks from AI assistants. Includes document analysis, e-signatures, and deck creation.

environmentVariables.name: AIDOCX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for AiDocX (starts with ak_). Get it at https://app.aidocx.ai → Settings → API Keys

environmentVariables.name: AIDOCX_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: API secret for AiDocX (64-char hex). Get it at https://app.aidocx.ai → Settings → API Keys
